downloadConcurrency.title: Download concurrency
downloadConcurrency.description: Set the number of files to download simultaneously in drive transfers. Range: 16-64

uploadConcurrency.title: Upload concurrency
uploadConcurrency.description: Set the number of files to upload simultaneously in drive transfers. Range: 4-16

uploadCreateManyConcurrency.title: Upload metadata concurrency
uploadCreateManyConcurrency.description: Set the number of requests to run simultaneously before starting file uploads. Range: 1-4

no_contents_section_message.0: No files or folders in this folder
no_contents_section_message.1: Drag and drop files or folders here to upload

#.1: Failed to get path info for directory creation
#.2: A folder with the same name already exists.

conflict_name.title: There are duplicate name items
conflict_name.description: Please choose how to handle {{count}} duplicates.
conflict_name.option_suffix: Rename: rename in the format name (2) before uploading
conflict_name.option_skip: Skip: upload after excluding duplicate items

delete_items.title: Delete Items
delete_items.description: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the selected items? This action cannot be undone.

mod.title: Mod Manager

dad_section.title: Add to {{name}}
dad_section.description: Compressed files will be automatically extracted

download_dialog.title: Download from URL
download_dialog.description: Download the archive to the selected character folder and extract it automatically.
download_dialog.no_target: Select a character folder on the left
download_dialog.file_only: Only direct file downloads are supported.

drag_drop.file_path_unavailable: Unable to resolve the file path.
drag_drop.unsupported_file_with_images: {{fileName}} is not a supported file type. (Only archives, folders, and image files are allowed.)
drag_drop.unsupported_file_archive_only: {{fileName}} is not a supported file type. (Only archives or folders are allowed.)
drag_drop.processing_error: An error occurred while processing the file.

extract_archive_path.title: Choose extraction path
extract_archive_path.description: Choose the extracted folder structure when {{fileName}} contains a single top-level folder.

add-game.title: Add Game
add-game.xxmi_path_required: Set the XXMI path first to load importers.

#.1: Please select a mod folder path

edit-game.title: Edit Game
edit-game.order_description: Use the arrow buttons to change this game's position in the dropdown.

preset-management.legacy-description: This preset uses the old format and cannot be applied. Delete and recreate it.

delete-game.title: Delete Game
delete-game.description: Are you sure you want to delete '{{name}}'? This action cannot be undone, and the game's presets will also be deleted.

delete-mod.title: Are you sure you want to delete this mod?
delete-mod.description: Deleted mods can be restored from the recycle bin.

rename-mod.title: Rename Mod
rename-mod.description: Change the folder name used for this mod.

texture-resize.title: Resize mod textures
texture-resize.description: Scan "{{name}}" for DDS files and resize them in place.

#.already-exists: A folder with that name already exists

delete-folder.title: Delete Folder
delete-folder.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? The folder can be restored from the recycle bin.

delete-preview.title: Delete Preview
delete-preview.description: Are you sure you want to delete the preview for "{{name}}"? It can be restored from the recycle bin.

overwrite-preview.title: Overwrite Existing Preview?
overwrite-preview.description: "{{name}}" already has a preview. Continue to replace it with the new file.

conflict.title: Duplicate mod entries found
conflict.description: These folders are treated as the same mod because the DISABLED prefix is ignored. Continue to rename the disabled duplicates and create the preset.

install.title: Install Wuwa Mod Fixer
install.description: Wuwa Mod Fixer is not installed. Install the latest version now?

update.title: Update Wuwa Mod Fixer
update.description: A newer Wuwa Mod Fixer is available.
update.rate_limited_until: GitHub API rate limit is active until {{time}}.

derived_hashes.label: Add Derived Hashes
derived_hashes.description: Add missing texture state hashes (e.g. LOD Bias High/Medium, Cantarella wet, Chisa Enhanced E, Aemeath Charged) so character mod textures display correctly (some characters are not included).

stable_texture.label: Apply Stable Texture
stable_texture.description: Use RabbitFX to set stable textures for characters (currently Cantarella, Chisa, Cartethyia, Ciaccona...). Requires the latest RabbitFX.

aemeath_mech.label: Fix Aemeath Mech Form
aemeath_mech.description: Do not enable this option for Aemeath mech mods that are already normal. Do not apply the fix twice.

aero_fix.label: Aero FemaleRover Eye Fix
aero_fix.description: Use this when the eyes glitch while resonance energy is full.
aero_fix.warning: Enable this only if your mod actually has this issue.

add-game-mutation.duplicate-game-name: A game with that name already exists
add-game-mutation.duplicate-mod-folder-path: That mod folder path is already in use
add-game-mutation.invalid-params: Game name and mod folder path are required

toggle-mutation.1: {{processes}} is using the folder, so it cannot be modified
toggle-mutation.1-fallback: The folder is locked and cannot be modified

rename-mutation.1: The folder {{processes}} is using the folder, so it cannot be renamed
rename-mutation.1-fallback: The folder is locked and cannot be renamed
rename-mutation.2: Please enter a valid mod name

create-preset-mutation.duplicate-name: A preset with that name already exists
create-preset-mutation.conflict-resolve-failed: Some duplicate mod folders could not be resolved automatically

apply-preset-mutation.legacy: Legacy presets cannot be applied. Delete and recreate the preset.
apply-preset-mutation.missing: Preset applied, but {{count}} mods were missing

mod.empty_selection: Please select a group or character folder from the sidebar.

paste-preview.no-image: No image, image URL, or image file found in the clipboard.

preview-drop.unsupported: Only one image or video file can be dropped onto the sidebar as a preview.
preview-drop.path-error: Failed to resolve the file path.

gamebanana.title: GameBanana

auth.checking_description: Verifying the saved login cookie and reopening login if needed.
auth.required_description: Your saved login has expired or is no longer valid. Sign in again to continue.
auth.cancelled_description: Complete login to load GameBanana data.

manual_rmc.title: Set rmc Token
manual_rmc.description: Enter the GameBanana rmc cookie value from your browser.
manual_rmc.GAMEBANANA_MANUAL_RMC_SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save the rmc token.

gamebanana.supported_games_description: Select a game to load its overview and mod categories.
gamebanana.category_panel_description_nested: Browse subcategories in the current category.
gamebanana.no_categories: There are no categories to display.
gamebanana.error_description_unknown: The request failed. Check your GameBanana login or try again later.
gamebanana.error_description_auth: Authentication with GameBanana failed. Sign in again.
gamebanana.game_overview_description: Overview and highlighted submissions for the selected game.

open_mod_url.title: Open by Mod URL
open_mod_url.invalid: Enter a valid GameBanana mod URL.

gamebanana.latest_feed_description: Recent submissions for the selected game.
gamebanana.category_description: Explore subcategories and mods from this category.
gamebanana.mods_description: Browse paged mod listings for the selected category.
gamebanana.mod_details_description: Select a mod to inspect files, stats, and links.
gamebanana.comments_description: Browse GameBanana comments by popular or newest.
gamebanana.no_comments: There are no comments to display.
gamebanana.select_mod_prompt: Select a mod from the list to view its details.

narrow_window.title: Window is too narrow
narrow_window.description: Please widen the window to browse GameBanana content.

dashboard.empty_description: Select a tool from the sidebar or pick one below to get started.

d3d11_builder.title: d3d11.dll Builder
d3d11_builder.description: Builds the DLL to be injected into the game process for the selected version
d3d11_builder.version_hint: If the build fails, try again with an earlier version.

progress.XXMI_ERR_VS_NOT_FOUND: Could not find the Visual Studio environment (vcvars64.bat). Please make sure the C++ build tools are installed.
progress.XXMI_ERR_DLL_NOT_FOUND: Could not find the built d3d11.dll file.
progress.XXMI_ERR_DLL_NOT_WRITABLE: Cannot write d3d11.dll to the target Importer. Check the folder permissions.
progress.XXMI_ERR_DLL_IN_USE: Cannot replace d3d11.dll. Close the game first, then try again.
progress.XXMI_ERR_BUILD_FAILED: An unexpected error occurred during the build.

toggle_viewer_generator.title: Toggle Viewer Generator
toggle_viewer_generator.not_configured: XXMI path is not configured. Configure XXMI first.
toggle_viewer_generator.auto_generate_desc: Auto-generate toggle-viewer files from mod ini toggle sections.

dialog.title: Toggle Viewer Hotkey
dialog.description: Press the key combination to set

static_glb_converter.title: Static GLB Converter
static_glb_converter.description: Convert an XXMI/GIMI mod into a static GLB using matching asset layout files.
static_glb_converter.asset_layout_hint: This path is saved and reused when opening a model from the mod manager.
static_glb_converter.output_glb_placeholder: Where the .glb file will be written

texture_format_descriptions.jpeg-safe: Prefer JPEG, but keep alpha-dependent textures as PNG.
texture_format_descriptions.jpeg-force: Encode every texture as JPEG, including alpha textures.

static_glb_converter.jpeg_quality_hint: Used whenever the selected mode writes JPEG textures. Range: 1-100.
static_glb_converter.jpeg_quality_disabled_hint: JPEG quality is only used for JPEG modes.
static_glb_converter.include_tangents_description: Useful for some viewers, but can expose bad tangent data in older exports.
static_glb_converter.debug_mode_description: Saves extracted textures in a "texture-cache" folder next to the GLB.

texture_resizer.title: Texture Resizer
texture_resizer.target_folder_placeholder: Folder to scan recursively for DDS files

operation_descriptions.resize: Only change the texture size. The DDS format stays the same.
operation_descriptions.resize_and_convert: Resize the texture and re-encode it to a different DDS format while preserving color space.
operation_descriptions.convert: Keep the original texture size and only change the DDS output format.

mode_descriptions.percent: Scale textures down by percentage, then snap each file to the nearest valid DDS size.
mode_descriptions.custom: Use width and height as maximum bounds. Each texture keeps its original aspect ratio.

texture_resizer.custom_hint: Custom bounds are snapped to 1024px steps. Actual output is chosen per texture while preserving its source ratio.
texture_resizer.resize_step_description: Only valid 1024-multiple sizes are selectable on the slider.
texture_resizer.resize_step_unavailable: This texture has no valid 1024-step downscale candidate.
texture_resizer.output_format_description: Only formats compatible with the source color space are shown.
texture_resizer.backup_description: Create a sibling .bak file before overwriting each DDS. Existing backups are kept.
texture_resizer.texture_list_empty: Select a path and load the texture list.

toast.save_settings_failed: Failed to save texture processing settings
toast.load_failed: Failed to load the texture list

model_viewer.title: Model Viewer
model_viewer.convert_first: Convert a mod to GLB first, then open it here.

overwrite_preview.title: Replace preview
overwrite_preview.description: "{{name}}" already has a preview. Continue to replace it with the current viewer capture?

toast.save_to_ini_success: Saved current toggle values to INI
toast.save_to_ini_no_changes: No matching persist variables were found to save
toast.save_to_ini_error: Failed to save toggle values to INI
toast.capture_preview_success: Saved the current viewer capture as preview.png
toast.capture_preview_error: Failed to save the current viewer capture as preview.png

left.title: Added Scripts
left.description: Drag and drop to add scripts or click the + button to move to the right

noScripts.title: No available scripts
noScripts.description: Drag and drop Python files (.py) or executable files (.exe) here to add

noScripts.title: No scripts added
noScripts.description: Click the + button from the left list to add scripts

application.title: Application
application.runOnStartupDescription: Automatically launch the app when the system starts.
application.runInBackgroundDescription: Keep running in the background when all windows are closed.
application.runInBackgroundDisableConfirmDescription: Toggle Persist and Toggle Viewer work more reliably when background run is enabled. If you turn this off, closing all windows will quit the app, and you will not be able to use those features until the app is open again. Do you still want to turn off background run?

auto.title: Automatic update
auto.description: Check for updates on startup and every hour, then download them automatically.

notify.title: Update notifications
notify.description: Check for updates automatically, but only download them when you choose to.

off.title: Disabled
off.description: Do not check for or download updates automatically.

other.title: Other
other.moveTransferPageWhenStartTransfer: Go to transfer page on start
other.moveTransferPageWhenStartTransferDescrip: Automatically move to the transfer management page when a file transfer starts.
other.powerSaveBlockInTransferDescription: Prevent the system from entering sleep mode while transfer or sync is in progress.

mod_management.title: Mod Management
mod_management.archiveExtractPathModeDescription: Choose how archives with a single top-level folder should be extracted.
mod_management.deleteArchiveAfterExtractDescription: Delete the original archive file after extracting it to the mod folder
mod_management.moveFolderInsteadOfCopyDescription: Move instead of copy when dropping a folder into the mod folder (deletes original)
mod_management.copyShaderFixesOnEnableDescription: Copy ShaderFixes files from the mod into the active Importer's ShaderFixes folder when enabling a mod.
mod_management.searchModPreviewDescription: If no preview image exists in the character folder, search for preview images inside mod folders.

sidebar.modeDescription: Display the character sidebar as either a row list or a square preview grid.

grid.modeDescription: Choose how the mod grid decides card widths and column counts.
grid.responsiveBaseWidthDescription: Used to calculate how many columns fit in the available width. Range: 240 to 640.
grid.fixedCardWidthDescription: Keeps card width fixed and only changes how many columns fit. Range: 240 to 640.
grid.fixedColumnCountDescription: Always use this many columns when possible. Range: 1 to 8.

backdrop-blur.title: Use Blur
backdrop-blur.description: Disable this option if performance issues occur while exploring mods

virtualization.title: Use Virtualization
virtualization.description: Virtualizes the mod list to improve performance
virtualization.thresholdDescription: Applies virtualization when the number of mods exceeds the set count
virtualization.threshold_min: Threshold mod count must be at least 10.

downloadConcurrency.title: Download concurrency
downloadConcurrency.description: Controls how many files can be downloaded at the same time in drive transfers. Range: 16 to 64.

uploadConcurrency.title: Upload concurrency
uploadConcurrency.description: Controls how many files can be uploaded at the same time in drive transfers. Range: 4 to 16.

uploadCreateManyConcurrency.title: Upload metadata concurrency
uploadCreateManyConcurrency.description: Controls how many requests can run at the same time before file upload starts. Range: 1 to 4.

nameSortPolicy.title: Name sort policy
nameSortPolicy.description: Choose how spaces and numbers are handled when sorting drive items by name.

xxmi.persistTogglesDescription: Permanently saves toggle states by modifying the mod INI during reload
xxmi.persistNotFoundXXMI: Please set the XXMI Launcher path first.

alert.title: Warning
alert.description: Please verify the auto-detected XXMI launcher path. If it seems incorrect, please enter the path manually.

saveXXMIPath.configNotFound: Cannot find XXMI Launcher Config.json file in the specified path

adv.title: Advanced
adv.warning_description: Changing settings here may affect app behavior.

download-confirmation-overlay.title: Confirm Download
download-confirmation-overlay.need_select_character_folder: Select a character folder on the left

status.available: An update is available. Download it when you're ready.{{versionRangeText}}
status.downloaded: The update is ready to install.

available.title: A new version is available.
available.description: A new version of WWMM2 is available. Restart to update.

notAvailable.title: You're up to date.
notAvailable.description: There are no updates available right now.
